rules.title: Semantic element required
rules.description: Label component must render as a semantic <label> HTML element.
rules.remediation: Replace non-semantic wrapper (<div>, <span>) with <label>. Semantic element is required for browser form association and screen reader announcements.

rules.title: Required asterisk must be aria-hidden
rules.description: The .label__required span must carry aria-hidden='true'. Required state must be communicated separately via aria-required='true' on the form control.
rules.remediation: Add aria-hidden='true' to the .label__required span. Add aria-required='true' to the associated input, select, or textarea element.

rules.title: Label must be associated with a form control
rules.description: The <label> must be linked to its form control via a for attribute matching the control's id, or by nesting the control inside the label.
rules.remediation: Add a for='field-id' attribute to the label and a matching id='field-id' on the form control. Alternatively, nest the form control inside the label element.

rules.title: No hardcoded visual values in component CSS
rules.description: Component CSS must not use hardcoded hex, rgba, pixel sizes, or font values outside of token fallbacks in var().
rules.check: No raw color, size, or typography values outside var(--label-*, fallback) patterns
rules.remediation: Replace hardcoded values with component-level tokens (--label-*). Use var() with a single token reference. Fallbacks inside var() are acceptable as a safety net pending token.css update.

rules.title: Disabled state must use class and aria-disabled
rules.description: Disabled label must have both .label--disabled class (for CSS) and aria-disabled='true' attribute (for AT). The <label> element has no native :disabled pseudo-class.
rules.remediation: Add .label--disabled class and aria-disabled='true' attribute together on the <label> element when the associated field is disabled.

rules.title: RTL must use dir attribute, not hardcoded CSS direction
rules.description: RTL layout must be triggered by dir='rtl' on the label element or an ancestor. Do not use hardcoded text-align: right or flex-direction: row-reverse in component CSS.
rules.check: No hardcoded text-align: right or flex-direction: row-reverse in .label base selectors
rules.remediation: Set dir='rtl' on the <label> element or an ancestor element (<html>, a wrapping <div>). The browser handles inline-flex child order reversal automatically.

rules.title: Label text must be in .label__text child span
rules.description: Visible label text must be wrapped in a <span class='label__text'> for correct slot targeting and assembly compatibility.
rules.remediation: Wrap label text content in <span class='label__text'>. Do not place text directly as a text node inside .label.

rules.title: Component tokens should be in token.css
rules.description: The --label-* token definitions are currently scoped on .label in label.css. Per design system convention, they should be defined in the global token.css under a Label section.
rules.remediation: Add a '/* Label state tokens */' section to token.css with the tokens listed in analysis.md Missing Tokens. Remove the scoped definitions from label.css after adding to token.css.
